race.description: Thank You Cafe Nosh Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: AIRBURST (4) is bred to be a swimmer and has her hoof on the till at start eleven. Much better performance second-up when she sat on the speed for a game second over 1204m at Port Macquarie. Ticks a few boxes today and should prove too good for these. FASHION SPREE (8) is deep into the prep and the winkers go on. Warmed up late with a slashing second over 1250m here in the heavy (10) conditions. Fast tempo suits and Grant Buckley keeps the ride. Shapes as the main danger. IRISH ACCOLADE (10) is ready for this trip and further now. Backs up quickly after coming with a powerful run from last on the turn to finish third over 1200m at Quirindi. Stays in the calculations. SUNNY QUARTERS (2) stretches out to the 1412m for the first time after she finished a battling second over 1262m at this track. Place preferred.
